Port A End of Interrupt

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x4c
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Write-only. Clears edge-triggered interrupts on Port A. Write 1 to a bit to clear the corresponding edge interrupt. 0=no effect, 1=clear interrupt.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] eoi w 0x0 EOI

Field Descriptions

eoi - EOI

Write 1 to clear edge interrupt
